questions.question: Describe the principle of Abstraction in software engineering. Explain its benefits and how it is applied in real-world scenarios.
questions.hint: Focus on code abstraction and its impact on maintainability and scalability.

questions.question: What is the principle of YAGNI (You Ain't Gonna Need It)? Explain its significance in software design and how it can be applied to reduce unnecessary complexity in a system.
questions.hint: Use examples to illustrate the concept and its benefits in software development.

questions.question: Compare and contrast the principles of Single Responsibility Principle (SRP) and Open-Closed Principle (OCP) in software engineering. Provide examples to demonstrate their application in real-world scenarios.
questions.hint: Focus on the benefits of each principle and their impact on software design and development.
